description: Style NoteSummer shoe trend for men takes a leaf from equestrian style this year, with these Chelsea boots (we desis call it Jodhpur boots) from ganuchi. With a high ankle styling, riding trousers were initially tucked into these boots; however, modern styling requires you to wear denims over the high top (and a monochrome tee) Subsitute the tee with a sober cardi and a well-structured blazer for a dressy look. Product Details Round toed high ankle boots with tough side gussets Slip-on styling, has a pull loop at the heel collarUpper adhered to the tough outsoleTPU outsole with a stacked heel and aggressive lugsMaterial and CareLeatherUse a leather conditioner to clean productDo not store in direct sunlightWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
